bullets: Collaborated in an agile team to architect and build a ride-hailing kiosk and lightweight web app designed for users without smartphones, mobile data, or cash
Engineered intuitive front-end interfaces for ride requests, live trip tracking, and payment processing, ensuring accessibility for all users
Developed robust back-end services handling authentication, ride bookings, payments, and real-time trip status updates with seamless database integration
Partnered closely with UX designers and QA testers to iteratively improve usability, safety features, and overall system reliability
Contributed to full-stack development of an online clinic booking system that streamlined appointment scheduling for CPUT students
Built responsive front-end booking interfaces and developed server-side logic for comprehensive appointment management workflows
Designed and implemented relational database schemas to securely store patient records and booking data with proper data integrity
Led testing and debugging efforts across the application stack, resulting in measurable improvements to system efficiency and user experience
Developed a student marketplace mobile application as part of a collaborative team, enabling peer-to-peer listings, messaging, and secure transactions
Implemented core features including user authentication, product listings management, real-time messaging, and transaction processing
Conducted thorough requirements analysis, API integration, and iterative testing cycles to ensure scalability, usability, and reliability
Contributed to continuous improvement through code reviews, performance optimization, and user feedback incorporation
